themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 6 verses. Commentary leans on "Thomas Aquinas on Exposition on the Psalms of David: Next he attaches the reason for this man...". Word-study detail reinforces "הָאָ֑רֶץ: in all the earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".
